name: Green Bean Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bread crumbs, coarse whole wheat
3/4 cup Bread crumbs, fine whole wheat
1 Egg, slightly beaten with 2 tablespoons cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a small saucepan.
2. Stir in flour and cook until smooth.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens.
4. Add salt, onion, and Worcestershire sauce; stir to combine.
5. Mash or chop the green beans.
6. Mix in coarse bread crumbs and hot white sauce.
7. Chill the mixture.
8. Shape into croquettes, using about 1 tablespoon of mixture for each.
9. Roll each croquette in fine bread crumbs.
10. Dip in egg wash.
11. Roll again in fine bread crumbs.
12. Fry in a small amount of hot oil in a skillet until golden brown.
13. Serve with chili sauce.
